name: Oneka Ridge Golf Course
address: 5610 120th St N, White Bear Township, MN 55110
about: Oneka Ridge Golf Course features an indoor golf studio equipped with three Full Swing HD golf simulators. The facility offers a variety of experiences including world course play, range sessions, and video lessons with PGA professionals. It accommodates golfers of all skill levels and is a popular destination for leagues, tournaments, and group events, especially during the winter season when the outdoor course is closed. The clubhouse dining area serves carry-out food, and there is a full service bar available.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Full Swing HD simulators for a realistic golf experience
PGA professional instruction available for personalized lessons
Full bar and gourmet pizza service for a complete social experience
Multiple league options including winter and junior leagues

food_and_drink.notes: Gourmet pizzas available for purchase; carry-out food served from clubhouse dining area.

simulator_hardware.notes: 3 brand new state of the art simulators

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The context does not specify, but it is standard practice to bring your own clubs for simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full bar and gourmet pizzas for purchase. Outside food and drink policies are not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on the simulator is not explicitly timed, but the outdoor course is rated to play in 4 hours and 8 minutes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior golf lessons, a PGA Junior League, and other programs, making it a kid-friendly environment.
